generic.name: Basic Setting
generic.help_center_index_description: Ideal for feature-rich product user manuals

head_html.label: Head HTML Code
head_html.info: This part of the content will be embedded in the <head> tag of the site. Please use standard HTML format.

content.label: Content
content.info: Synchronized from data source, cannot be edited

icon.label: Page icon
icon.info: Lucide icon shown in lists and cards. Options come from site settings → Lucide icons. Look up icon names: lucide.dev/icons

community.logo_url_info: Logo shown in the site header
community.default_avatar_info: Shown for members who have not set an avatar
community.is_allow_published_info: When enabled, submissions go live immediately; when disabled, staff must approve before they appear.
community.is_allow_reply_published_info: Independent from post review. When enabled, replies appear immediately; when disabled, staff must approve replies first.
community.daily_post_reply_limit_info: -1 means unlimited (frontend form hide only). Users with department IDs are exempt.
community.feedback_useful_type_placeholder: e.g. 😊 — configure in app feedback settings
community.feature_tags_info: One tag per line; used to categorize posts.
community.collection_tags_info: One tag per line; used as collections.
community.header_menu_info: Format: menu_name[url — one entry per line.

community_templates.shared_slogan_default: 👋 A maker community to learn and grow together
community_templates.hero_image_url_info: Cover image for the hero section. Theme default: images/hero.png in assets.
community_templates.hero_text_color_info: Optional override. Leave empty to use the site primary color.
community_templates.hero_bg_color_info: Optional color overlay on top of the background image.
community_templates.post_icon_info: Lucide icon shown in lists and detail views. Options come from site settings → Lucide icons. Look up icon names: lucide.dev/icons
community_templates.post_collection_info: Choose from collection tags on the home page
community_templates.post_feature_info: Choose from feature tags on the home page
community_templates.post_recommend_info: When enabled, the post can appear in the featured list

lucide_icons.label: Allowed Lucide icon names
lucide_icons.info: One kebab-case icon name per line (e.g. help-circle, package). Look up icon names: lucide.dev/icons. Page templates use this list for the icon dropdown. Icons must match the theme JS bundle (src/lucide_icons.js); adding names here without updating the bundle will not render on the site.
